temporal_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on an older man with graying hair, wearing a black collared shirt. He is in a dimly lit, opulent room, with a large, out-of-focus golden chandelier visible on the right and a background of dark wood and glowing orbs of light. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The man has a slight, knowing smile as he looks off-camera. The audio begins with the distinct, high-pitched beep of a mobile phone ringing. The man brings a silver flip phone to his ear, his expression shifting to one of serious concentration. A man answers the call, his voice calm and slightly weary as he says, "Hello?" The camera angle changes to a close-up, over-the-shoulder view of a younger man in a light blue button-down shirt. He is seen from behind, holding the same silver flip phone to his ear. He appears to be in an office, with horizontal blinds visible in the background. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left corner. After a brief pause, he continues in a more conversational and slightly concerned tone, "Hello? Brother Chen?" The background is quiet, with no music, focusing entirely on the phone conversation.
